rows.label: tev030401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Zeedi about construction Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zeedi if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Zeedi about construction Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0001
rows.name:
The yellow Dolls here aren't
very productive, are they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0002
rows.name:
With a little work, they could
probably save us the trouble of
retaining mechanics, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm... I figure they'll need
about 80 pizzas per minute of
operation, give or take?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Wait, no. We can't waste that much
pizza on simple fuel, can we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0011
rows.name:
I decided to take a teeny little
break because I got hungry, you
know? But wow, did I get chewed out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0012
rows.name: ...Hmm? How teeny is teeny?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, I had a snack before lunch, okay? Then I stopped
for pizza, and since it was a nice day I dozed off.
And when I woke up it was after dark, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0016
rows.name:
I suppose the break must have been about half the
day? But what's wrong with that? That's normal!
Why do you humans get so angry all the time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Sometimes I feel like I need an
anger translator or... something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I tried souping up the the
yellow Dolls a little, but
they ended up going...berserk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0028
rows.name:
No one got a forklift through
the gut or anything nasty like
that, okay? But still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Well, the Dolls may have accidentally used
their comm devices to order takeout. Lots of
of takeout. A WHOLE lot, if you get my drift?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Everyone in the industrial district helped devour the
piles of pizza and hordes of hot dogs, you know? But
I may not be collecting a paycheck for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Zeedi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0031
rows.name:
The humans here are quick to anger,
but I realize that it's just because
they want to do a good job, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0032
rows.name:
They're not angry the way that Alex person
was angry. Once that sunk in, I started
feeling a lot more at home here, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'm going to try applying myself more
so I can live up to to everyone's
expectations, if that makes sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030401_MSG0034
rows.name:
From now on, I'm limiting my lunch
breaks to three hours and not a
second over! That's good, right?[ST:wait ]
